summary: A fan‑favorite capture of an electrifying show, praised for its raw rock‑and‑roll energy
review: The reviewer is wildly enthusiastic, calling the Dead “the best f***ing rock and roll band in the whole world” and even quoting Bob Weir’s stage banter. No details are given about the audio source or sound quality, so while the performance is clearly loved, the technical aspects of this recording remain unspecified.

ai_rating.rationale: A single 5‑star review expresses strong enthusiasm for the show; lack of any recording‑quality commentary limits confidence in rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not mention sound clarity, mix, or source type, so recording quality cannot be assessed from the available comments.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific observations about set structure or pacing were provided.

band_member_comments.Bob: Reviewer highlighted Bob Weir with the quoted line “At your service.”
